passiveAbilities.name: Slow
passiveAbilities.description: This model's Jog actions are limited to 2”.

passiveAbilities.name: Ramshackle Armour
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all non-Magical Dmg suffered by -1.

passiveAbilities.name: Predictable Combatant
passiveAbilities.description: During a round of combat, before each player selects their combat card, you must reveal your hand to your opponent.

activeAbilities.name: Two Goblins Walk into a Tavern
activeAbilities.description: Two other target Goblins each gain +1 energy and +2 Evade stat until end of turn. You must choose two different targets.

arcaneAbilities.name: Fireblast
arcaneAbilities.description:
[B]X: Target character suffers 2X Magical Dmg.
Catastrophe: This ability cannot be used for the remainder of the game. All models within a 3” pulse suffer 4 magical Dmg.

signatureMove.name: Panic and Flee
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Move this model 3” directly away from the enemy. Discard all energy on this character.
